query:
-- Quadro de Pessoal
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_colaboradores,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Ativo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ativos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Ferias' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ferias,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Afastado' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as afastados,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Licenca' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as licenca,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Desligado' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as desligados
FROM employees 
WHERE company_id = 60002;

-- Obras ativas
SELECT COUNT(*) as obras_ativas FROM obras WHERE company_id = 60002 AND status = 'Ativa';

-- ASOs vencidos
SELECT COUNT(*) as asos_vencidos FROM employees 
WHERE company_id = 60002 AND status = 'Ativo' 
AND (aso_vencimento IS NULL OR aso_vencimento < NOW());

-- ASOs vencendo em 60 dias
SELECT COUNT(*) as asos_vencendo_60d FROM employees 
WHERE company_id = 60002 AND status = 'Ativo' 
AND aso_vencimento IS NOT NULL 
AND aso_vencimento >= NOW() 
AND aso_vencimento <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY);

-- Férias pendentes (período aquisitivo vencido)
SELECT COUNT(*) as ferias_pendentes FROM employees 
WHERE company_id = 60002 AND status = 'Ativo' 
AND data_admissao IS NOT NULL 
AND DATEDIFF(NOW(), data_admissao) >= 365;
